changeSet.author: openelis-immunology
changeSet.comment: Adding page_type column to notebook_page for UI pattern differentiation in immunology workflow.

changeSet.author: openelis-immunology
changeSet.comment: Adding CHECK constraint for page_type values.

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.notebook_page DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_page_type;

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_page_type'

changeSet.comment: Update CHECK constraint to add STORAGE_ASSIGNMENT for MNTD workflow.
